title: Squire Kilda Combi 10/1800 – Heavy Duty Armoured Steel Bike Cable Lock with Key – Weatherproof, 1800mm
features: TOUGH INTEGRATED LIGHTWEIGHT COMBINATION CABLE BIKE LOCK: The Kilda Combi 10/1800 bicycle lock from Squire Locks consists of an 1800 mm steel cable with an integrated anti-theft 4-wheel combination lock body. The flexible, scratch-resistant cover on the 10 mm diameter cable ensures protection from scratches and abrasions when locking your bike. A bike mount carrying bracket is also included. The Kilda Combi 10/1800 weighs 0.49 kg, making it lightweight and easy to transport on your bike when not in use.

VERSATILE COMBINATION LIGHTWEIGHT CABLE BIKE LOCK: The Squire Kilda Combi 10/1800 cable bike lock provides versatile tough security for bicycles and bike accessories. Made from steel cable, this cycle lock features a fully re-codable, integrated 4-wheel combination lock body with 10,000 possible combinations, an essential bike accessory for all cyclists.

WEATHERPROOF AND DURABLE: The tough steel cable is protected with a durable PVC cover which is highly effective in harsh weather conditions. The integrated lock body provides high resilience against water and corrosion ensuring long lasting protection and durability.

MULTIPURPOSE AND EASY TO USE: The lightweight and portable design of the Kilda Combi 10/1800 bike lock makes it easy to carry on your ride. Use this versatile bicycle lock to easily secure your bike, bike wheels and accessories to fences, gates, bike racks and lamp posts. The Kilda Combi 10/1800 bike lock is also available in a keyed lock version and in a variety of different sizes and cable diameters.

HIGH QUALITY FROM A TRUSTED BRAND: The Squire Locks Kilda Combi 10/1800 bike lock is a high-quality bike accessory and ensures tough security. It comes with the Squire Locks 10-year guarantee for extra peace of mind. The Squire name has been at the forefront of lock making since 1780 with a great British history carried down through eight generations. Today, Squire is recognised for making the toughest locks in the world and is a leader in bicycle and motorcycle security accessories.
description: Product Description KILDA COMBI 10/1800 Squire Cable Locks Combination Lock 1800mm Cable length 600mm 10mm Cable Diameter 10mm Combination Lock 1800mm Cable length 1800mm 10mm Cable Diameter 12mm Combination Lock 1800mm Cable length 1800mm 10mm Cable Diameter 10mm Combination Lock 1800mm Cable length 1800mm 10mm Cable Diameter 12mm Previous page KILDA COMBI 10/600 Learn More KILDA COMBI12/1800 Learn More KILDA 10/1800 Learn More KILDA 12 /1800 Learn More Next page Previous page Kilda Combi 10/1800 The Kilda Combi 10/1800 is a long bike cable lock at 1.8 metres in length, with a tough steel cable core wrapped in a protective weatherproof sleeve. Kilda Cable Locks Lightweight, tough and flexible security with our integrated Bike Cable Locks. Innovative in design with a wide range of cable lengths, available in both key and combination models. Constructed from high-tensile steel These strong bike cable locks are ideal for securing your bike for short periods in low risk areas, or for layering your bike security when locking wheels or accessories.
